name: Microwave Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into a quart glass container.
2. If desired, add nonfat dry milk to make the yogurt "creamier."
3. Heat in the microwave until the milk reaches about 175°F.
- This takes approximately 9 minutes.
4. Remove from the microwave and let cool until the milk reaches about 100°F.
5. Add two tablespoons of active yogurt.
6. Stir well using a whisk.
7. Cover with plastic wrap.
8. Wrap the bowl in a towel.
9. Place the bowl back into the microwave.
10. Heat on low for 30 seconds.
11. Repeat heating on low for 30-60 minutes, doing this about 4 times in total.
You will have yogurt when finished. If you leave it alone all day but keep it warm, it will also turn into yogurt, albeit taking longer. Refrigerate and enjoy the savings compared to Dannon's prices.
